Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Zenith Starship]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The Zenith Starship has protections against magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — The Zenith Starship is an entity that individuals prove themselves to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The Zenith Starship is the ship where the Captain's quarters are located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The protagonist has found the Zenith Starship and been accepted as its Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — The Zenith Starship is something the narrator's father wants to benefit from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — The Zenith Starship is a vessel that the Galactic Union requested visual confirmation of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — The Zenith Starship is a vessel whose capabilities are unknown and potentially unpredictable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The Zenith Starship is the only entity that could tell Varic he had seven versions of himself.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — The Last Horizon is a Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — The Zenith Starship has a command structure that can be challenged for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — The Zenith Starship wishes to know if the crew members have the stuff of heroes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — The Zenith Starship is a starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — The Zenith Starship is being tested by a creature dragging claws down its hull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Mell was teleported into the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — The Zenith Starship provides unrestricted access to crew members for a minimum of five years as part of their contract.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — The Zenith Starship is a vessel that can be personally matched by Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — The Zenith Starship is a vessel that Mell looks forward to taking full advantage of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 25''' — The magic of the Zenith Starship is considered a forbidden secret of the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 26''' — The Captain successfully inherited the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The Zenith Starship is a vessel that has defeated an enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — The Zenith Starship is one of the legends heard by Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — The Zenith Starship is the name of the starship being repaired.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — The Zenith Starship is a starship that was seen cresting a nearby asteroid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Starhammer expected to be caught on the Zenith Starship's sensors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — The Zenith Starship has fabricators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — The Zenith Starship is a vessel whose crew might attempt to rescue Varic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 53''' — The Zenith Starship is located in the Advocate hangar.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — There is a bounty for the captured Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — The crew possesses the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — The Zenith Starship is used by Benri Vallenar's team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — The Zenith Starship is the vessel Ryzer and Raion need to return to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — The Zenith Starship is being targeted by Visiri bullets and bolts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The Zenith Starship went to war at full power for the first time in centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — The Zenith Starship allows Horizon to share the burden of spellcasting.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — The Zenith Starship is associated with the Rebel Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Zenith Starship is a ship with devastating power and uncertain allegiance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Zenith Starship is made of smooth, dark metal that shines blue-green.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — The students are aboard the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — The Zenith Starship is a ship that some wizards-in-training live aboard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The Zenith Starship is a style of starship that resembles dark-metal birds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The Zenith Starship has a gun on its prow that is made of razor-edged energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — The Zenith Starship is an exploratory vessel and a transport for heroes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The Zenith Starship is missing many of its supplementary ships and its army of Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Zenith Starship has declared war on the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The Zenith Starship can conjure entire armies of ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Dancer would hate for the Advocates to fight alongside the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — The Zenith Starship is the location where Horizon teleported the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — The Zenith Starship is the vessel the narrator is on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Zenith Starship is a vessel targeted by energy from Aila's Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Zenith Starship can attempt to take control from its pilot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Zenith Starship has been damaged.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Zenith Starship is a vessel that the Vallenar Corporation may tear down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — The Zenith Starship is the name of the ship Omega is aboard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — The Zenith Starship is a Karoshan vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — The Zenith Starship is part of a Karoshan fleet invading Zykaros.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — The Zenith Starship elongated and sharpened, with wings like blades that sparked with blue electricity.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
